$comment: Pyxis golden material_binding_collection — V2.A.18 UsdCollectionAPI binding. Three cubes; a 'red' collection on /World includes CubeA + CubeC and binds the red OpenPBR material to that collection. CubeB has no binding → renderer default. The two flanking cubes must render red; the middle cube must render default grey. Pins UsdShadeMaterialBindingAPI::ComputeBoundMaterial's collection-walk path.
